column1: # Wikipedia interwiki (langlinks) harvest — the specialized long tail Wikidata
# lacks a RU label for. Each row names an EXACT English Wikipedia article title;
# the harvester pulls that article's Russian interlanguage link (ground-truth
# EN↔RU pair). A row whose article has no RU langlink is auto-skipped (logged),
# so this list can be generous — the API does the filtering.

column3: # the precise EN article for flotation
